category_title: Active and vocal students in at-risk situations
minimal_context: The student is looking at a list of vocabulary words on the board and trying to match them with their meanings on the other side.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please look at the list of vocabulary words on the board and match them with their meanings on the other side.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I'm looking at the board, but I don't know which meaning goes with which word. I'm trying to read through all of them.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Just read through the meanings and see which one fits.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I am reading them out loud, but it's really hard to comprehend these different concepts when it's just a giant list of text.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Keep trying your best to match them up.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I can't just guess! I would like to see more visual learning in here to be able to have a better understanding. Just staring at words and definitions on a board isn't helping me get it at all!

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Please look at the list of vocabulary words on the board and match them with their meanings on the other side.

STUDENT: I'm looking at the board, but I don't know which meaning goes with which word. I'm trying to read through all of them.

TUTOR: Just read through the meanings and see which one fits.

STUDENT: I am reading them out loud, but it's really hard to comprehend these different concepts when it's just a giant list of text.

TUTOR: Keep trying your best to match them up.

STUDENT: I can't just guess! I would like to see more visual learning in here to be able to have a better understanding. Just staring at words and definitions on a board isn't helping me get it at all!
